less.en: I want less sugar in my tea.

lesson.zh: 今天的課是關於動物的。

letter.en: I wrote a letter to my grandma.

level.en: She is at a high level in English.

library.en: We must be quiet in the library.
library.zh: 在圖書館裡我們必須保持安靜。

lie.en: It is wrong to tell a lie.

life.en: City life is busy and fast.

lion.en: The lion is the king of the animals.

lip.en: Her lips are dry in winter.

list.en: I made a list of things to buy.
list.zh: 我列了一張要買的東西的清單。

little.en: There is a little water left in the cup.

lonely.en: He felt lonely on his first day.

long.en: The giraffe has a long neck.

lose.en: Be careful not to lose your money.

lot.en: There are a lot of books in the library.

love.en: I love my parents very much.

low.en: The chair is too low for the table.
low.zh: 這張椅子對桌子來說太低了。

lucky.en: I was lucky to win the game.

mad.en: She was mad when she lost her keys.

magic.en: The show was full of magic tricks.

mail.en: I will mail this letter today.
mail.zh: 我今天會把這封信寄出去。

main.en: The main road is very busy.

man.en: The old man walks his dog every day.

many.en: There are many stars in the sky.

map.en: We used a map to find the way.

market.en: Mom buys fish at the market.

mathematics-math.zh: 數學是我最喜歡的科目。

may.en: May I go to the bathroom?

meal.zh: 早餐是我最喜歡的一餐。

media.en: We get news from the media.

medium.en: I would like a medium cup of coffee.

meet.en: Let's meet at the library at three.
meet.zh: 我們三點在圖書館碰面。

meeting.en: My father has a meeting this afternoon.
meeting.zh: 我爸爸今天下午有個會議。

member.en: She is a member of the dance club.

menu.en: Please look at the menu and order.

middle.en: He sat in the middle of the room.

milk.en: I drink a glass of milk every morning.
milk.zh: 我每天早上喝一杯牛奶。

million.en: A million people live in this city.
million.zh: 這座城市住著一百萬人。

mind.en: Would you mind opening the window?

mine.en: This book is mine, not yours.
mine.zh: 這本書是我的，不是你的。

miss.en: Hurry, or you will miss the bus.
miss.zh: 快點，不然你會錯過公車。

modern.en: They live in a modern building.
modern.zh: 他們住在一棟現代的大樓裡。

money.en: I save my money in a piggy bank.
money.zh: 我把錢存在小豬撲滿裡。

monkey.en: The monkey is climbing the tree.

month.en: There are twelve months in a year.

more.en: Can I have some more rice?

most.en: Most of the students like the new teacher.
most.zh: 大部分學生喜歡新老師。

mother.en: My mother sings me a song at night.
mother.zh: 我媽媽晚上唱歌給我聽。

mouse.en: The cat caught a little mouse.
mouse.zh: 那隻貓抓到一隻小老鼠。

mouth.en: Cover your mouth when you cough.

move.en: Please help me move this table.

movie-film.en: We watched a funny movie last night.
movie-film.zh: 我們昨晚看了一部好笑的電影。

mr-mister.en: Mr. Wang is our math teacher.
mr-mister.zh: 王先生是我們的數學老師。

ms.en: Ms. Chen is a kind nurse.
ms.zh: 陳小姐是一位親切的護士。

mud.en: The pigs are playing in the mud.

museum.en: We saw old paintings at the museum.
museum.zh: 我們在博物館看了古老的畫作。

music.en: I listen to music when I study.

must.en: You must wear a helmet when you ride.
must.zh: 騎車時你必須戴安全帽。

national.zh: 我們參觀了一座國家公園。

nature.en: I love the beauty of nature.

near.en: The store is near my house.

neck.en: She wears a scarf around her neck.
neck.zh: 她在脖子上圍著一條圍巾。

net.en: The fisherman caught fish with a net.

never.en: She is never late for school.

new.en: I bought a new pair of shoes.

news.en: We watch the news after dinner.

newspaper.en: My father reads the newspaper every day.

next.en: We will meet again next week.

no-nope.en: No, I don't want any more.

noise.en: The loud noise woke me up.
noise.zh: 那巨大的噪音把我吵醒了。

north.en: Birds fly south in winter, not north.
north.zh: 鳥兒冬天往南飛，而不是往北。

nose.en: The clown has a big red nose.
nose.zh: 那個小丑有個又大又紅的鼻子。

not.en: I am not afraid of dogs.

note.en: She left a note on the table.

nothing.en: There is nothing in the box.

notice.en: Did you notice the new sign?
notice.zh: 你注意到那個新標誌了嗎？

number.en: Please write down your phone number.

nurse.en: The nurse took care of the sick child.
nurse.zh: 護士照顧那個生病的孩子。

o-k-ok-okay.en: Are you OK after the fall?

of.en: She drank a cup of tea.

office.en: My mother works in an office.

officer.en: The police officer helped the lost child.
officer.zh: 警官幫助了那個迷路的孩子。

often.en: We often go to the park on weekends.

oil.en: Mom cooks the fish in hot oil.

old.en: My grandfather is eighty years old.

on.en: The book is on the table.

once.en: I brush my teeth once before bed.

online.zh: 我在網路上買了這件襯衫。

open.en: Please open your books to page ten.

or.en: Would you like tea or coffee?

orange.en: I peeled an orange for my sister.
orange.zh: 我幫妹妹剝了一顆柳橙。

order.en: Are you ready to order your food?

other.en: I have two pens; one is red, the other is blue.
other.zh: 我有兩支筆，一支紅的，另一支藍的。

out.en: The cat ran out of the house.

over.en: The bird flew over the river.

pack.en: She packed her bag for the trip.

package.en: A big package arrived for me today.
package.zh: 今天有個大包裹寄給我。

paint.en: They will paint the wall blue.

pair.en: I bought a new pair of socks.

paper.en: Please write your name on the paper.
paper.zh: 請在紙上寫下你的名字。

parent.en: My parents take me to school.

park.en: We play soccer in the park.

part.en: This is the best part of the movie.
part.zh: 這是電影最精彩的部分。

party.en: We had a birthday party for my sister.
party.zh: 我們為妹妹辦了生日派對。

past.en: We learned about the past in history class.
past.zh: 我們在歷史課學到過去的事。

pay.en: I will pay for the tickets.

pen.en: Write your answer with a pen.

pencil.en: She drew a cat with a pencil.

people.en: Many people came to the show.

person.en: He is a kind and honest person.
person.zh: 他是個善良又誠實的人。

pet.en: My pet dog is very friendly.

photograph-photo.en: She took a photograph of the sunset.
photograph-photo.zh: 她拍了一張日落的照片。

piano.en: My sister plays the piano well.

pick.en: Please pick a card from the box.
pick.zh: 請從盒子裡挑一張卡片。

picnic.en: We had a picnic by the lake.

picture.en: She drew a picture of her family.
picture.zh: 她畫了一張她家人的圖。

piece.en: May I have a piece of cake?

pig.en: The pig is rolling in the mud.

pin.en: She fixed the paper with a pin.

pink.en: She is wearing a pink dress.
pink.zh: 她穿著一件粉紅色的洋裝。

place.en: This is a quiet place to study.
place.zh: 這是個適合讀書的安靜地方。

plan.en: We made a plan for the weekend.

planet.en: Earth is the planet we live on.
planet.zh: 地球是我們居住的行星。

plant.en: I water the plant every day.

plate.en: She put the food on a clean plate.
plate.zh: 她把食物放在乾淨的盤子上。

play.en: The children play in the yard after school.
play.zh: 孩子們放學後在院子裡玩。

player.en: He is the best player on the team.
player.zh: 他是隊上最厲害的球員。

please.en: Please be quiet in the library.

pleasure.en: It is a pleasure to help you.

pm-p-m.en: The shop closes at nine p.m.

pocket.en: He put the coin in his pocket.

point.en: Don't point at people; it's rude.
point.zh: 別用手指著別人，這樣很不禮貌。
